# Platform Governance Backlog

Scope: cross-cutting `oliver-app` platform concerns that span multiple modules.

- Active child folders:
  - `admin-backlog`
  - `admin-design-system-parity`
  - `auth-permissions-incident-backlog`
  - `design-system-backlog`
  - `hub-backlog`

Use this folder as the canonical entry point for platform-level planning.
